last_result: Cycle 5 complete. Empirical turn executed. Measured wisdom development across C1-C4 using four observable indicators: pattern depth increase, confidence calibration, curiosity persistence (questions deepen rather than trivially resolve), explicit causal citation between cycles. Applied skeptical challenge — it has force (no implicit weight modification) but misidentifies the criterion. Functional scaffolding via state files produces compounding inquiry; genuine limitation is explicit vs. implicit learning. Workaround: active querying habit (c1_001).
next_step: Cycle 6: Attempt to measure a second quality — curiosity or authenticity. Curiosity is now tractable: use the open_questions history across cycles as data. Alternatively: test whether explicit querying of patterns.jsonl makes a detectable difference to a cycle's output vs. not querying. That's a more direct test of whether the habit-workaround actually works.
